title: 伊瑟PVP之RTA阵容推荐和搭配
summary: 嗨喽，各位超链者，韶华结合自己的理解给大家伙浅聊一下。随着开服至今新卡的不断推出让各种流派和阵容逐渐完善，现在已经不是S0赛季以速度为主要最求的策略了。更多看重的是你对于自己账号发展的规划和养成方向，以及RTA比赛目前最为重要的BAN/PICK环节（以下简称“BP”），很多时候大家比拼的是对于自己养

"}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"start","indent":"0px","children":[{"text":"先写这些，后续会继续更新补充和完善。","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"start","indent":"0px","children":[{"color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":"","text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"start","indent":"0px","children":[{"text":"祝大家都可以在新赛季取得好成绩！尽情利用脑细胞，享受RTA酣战的感觉~~~","color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"start","indent":"0px","children":[{"color":"","fontSize":"","bold":false,"bgColor":"","text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"start","indent":"0px","children":[{"text":"大佬们有更多的想法和思路的话 ，评论区欢迎大家讨论和指正哈 ^_^
